title: ophrys × breviappendiculata
intro: Ophrys × breviappendiculata, also known as the Breda's bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Ophrys breviculus and Ophrys appendiculata. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Ophrys × breviappendiculata may include improved digestion, reduced fever, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, it can be consumed as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
